pi_items.source: setup_task.sh lines 19, 22, 25 (node creation via curl POST); export_result.sh lines 42-44 (node queries); README.md lines 20-22 (documentation)
task.json description line 5; README.md line 33; export_result.sh lines 67-72 (dashboard search includes 'Building' pattern)
task.json description line 5 ('At minimum 6 feeds'); README.md line 31 ('at least 6 feeds total (2 per zone: power + kWh)'); verifier.py line 87 (checks feed_count >= 6)

privileged_info_summary: The multizone_submetering_configuration task requires configuring three Emoncms nodes (zone_hvac, zone_lighting, zone_sockets) with power_w inputs. The task requires creating at least 6 feeds total (2 per zone for power and kWh) and a dashboard named 'Building Submetering' with at least 4 widgets. The setup uses synthetic power data: HVAC at 3480W, lighting at 847W, and sockets at 1195W. Each zone requires at least 2 process steps on its power_w input (a log-to-feed process and a Power-to-kWh process for energy accumulation).
